data.name: Rhino

abilities.name: Destiny Calling
abilities.text: Your other characters get +2 {Willpower}.

data.flavor_text:
"Don't forget, you are awesome. You can handle
anything. Now channel your inner awesomeness and
CLEAR THIS TRAP!"

abilities.name: Who's Next?
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you pay 2 {Ink} less for the next Puppy character you play this turn.

abilities.name: Don't Be Afraid
abilities.text: Your Puppy characters gain Ward. (Opponents can't choose them except to challenge.)

data.name: King Stefan
data.flavor_text:
Every parent struggles with getting their baby to
sleep. Kings are no different.

keywords.name: Shift 3
keywords.text: (You may pay 3 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Bolt.)

abilities.name: Mark of Power
abilities.text: Whenever you ready this character, gain 1 lore for each other undamaged character you have in play.

abilities.name: Bolt Stare
abilities.text: {Exert} — Banish chosen Illusion character.

data.name: Roger Radcliffe

abilities.name: There You Go
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you may remove up to 1 damage from each of your Puppy characters.

data.flavor_text:
The best part of completing the obstacle course
was finding their human at the end.

data.name: Trusty

keywords.name: Support
keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

data.flavor_text:
"As my grandpappy, Old Reliable, used to say, save
your energy for when it matters."

data.name: Peg

abilities.name: Captive Audience
abilities.text: {Exert} — If you have 3 or more other characters in play, draw a card.

data.flavor_text:
She was born to be a star no matter where she
performed.

data.name: Suzy
data.flavor_text:
The devoted mice were excited to surprise
Cinderella with a new dress. Smiling, Archazia
gave them a spool of magic thread. "This will
make it perfect," she said.

keywords.name: Bodyguard
keywords.text: (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

abilities.name: No Thanks Necessary
abilities.text: Once during your turn, whenever a card is put into your inkwell, your other characters with Bodyguard get +1 {Lore} this turn.

abilities.name: Now It's a Party
abilities.text: For each character you have in play, you pay 1 {Ink} less to play this character.

abilities.name: How's Pickings?
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may draw a card for each other character you have in play, then choose and discard that many cards.

keywords.name: Resist +1
keywords.text: (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 1.)

keywords.name: Singer 4
keywords.text: (This character counts as cost 4 to sing songs.)

keywords.name: Evasive
keywords.text: (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

abilities.name: Tell No Tales
abilities.text: Whenever one of your other characters is banished, you may remove all damage from chosen character.

keywords.name: Evasive
keywords.text: (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

keywords.name: Singer 5
keywords.text: (This character counts as cost 5 to sing songs.)

data.flavor_text: "My family's amazing, and I'm in my family, so..."

keywords.name: Singer 5
keywords.text: (This character counts as cost 5 to sing songs.)

abilities.name: Sweet Dreams
abilities.text: Whenever you remove 1 or more damage from a character, ready this character. She can't quest or challenge for the rest of this turn.

data.name: Cinderella

abilities.name: If the Slipper Fits
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may put an item card named The Glass Slipper from your discard on the bottom of your deck to gain 3 lore.

data.flavor_text: "But, you see, I have the other slipper."

data.name: Mariano Guzman

abilities.name: I See You
abilities.text: While you have a character named Dolores Madrigal in play, this character gets +1 {Lore}.

data.flavor_text:
The puzzles of the heart are trickier than anything
Archazia could come up with.

abilities.name: Winning Isn't Everything
abilities.text: When this character is banished, you may remove up to 2 damage from chosen character.

data.name: Bolt

keywords.name: Support
keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

data.flavor_text:
"Super dog versus super log! This is AWESOME!"
—Rhino

data.name: Pascal

keywords.name: Evasive
keywords.text: (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

data.flavor_text:
Once Pascal got into Archazia's flowerbeds, there
was no getting him out.

data.name: King Candy

abilities.name: Sweet Revenge
abilities.text: Whenever one of your other Racer characters is banished, each opponent chooses and banishes one of their characters.

data.flavor_text: "Get off of my track!"

abilities.name: Enduring Loyalty
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may remove up to 2 damage from chosen character and they gain Resist +1 until the start of your next turn. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

data.name: Fix-It Felix, Jr.

abilities.name: Let's Get to Work
abilities.text: Whenever you return a Racer character card from your discard to your hand, you may ready chosen Racer character. They can't quest for the rest of this turn.

data.flavor_text: "A trap is just a puzzle that's not very friendly."

data.flavor_text:
"I just made something unexpected. Something
sharp, something new."

abilities.text: Whenever this character challenges another character, you may return a Racer character card from your discard to your hand.

abilities.name: Outflank
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever one of your other characters is banished, this character gets +1 {Lore} this turn.

data.flavor_text: "I got that medal in the bag."

abilities.text: When you play this character, you may return up to 2 character cards with cost 2 or less each from your discard to your hand.

data.name: Pongo

abilities.name: Found You, You Little Rascal
abilities.text: At the start of your turn, look at the cards in your inkwell. You may play a Puppy character from there for free.

data.flavor_text: Tricks and traps are nothing for plucky pups.

abilities.name: He Needs Me
abilities.text: At the end of your turn, if this character is exerted, you may ready another chosen character of yours and remove all damage from them.

abilities.name: Gather Around
abilities.text: Whenever you play a character, this character gets +1 {Lore} this turn.

abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, chosen opposing character loses {Strength} equal to this character's {Lore} until the start of your next turn.

data.name: Snow White

abilities.name: Hidden Away
abilities.text: This character can't be challenged.

data.source: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs
data.flavor_text: A true heart can thwart many an evil scheme.

data.name: Koda
data.flavor_text:
"And then they were like, ‘How'd you catch so
many fish, Koda?’ And I said, ‘Well, you know me.
I know how to catch fish.’ And they said..."

keywords.name: Shift 4
keywords.text: (You may pay 4 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Mirabel Madrigal.)

abilities.name: Her Own Special Gift
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you may return a song card with cost 3 or less from your discard to your hand.

data.name: Calhoun

abilities.name: Tactical Advantage
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may choose and discard a card to give chosen opposing character -3 {Strength} until the start of your next turn.

data.flavor_text:
"Preparation and luck—you can only rely on one to
win a fight!"

data.name: Pepa Madrigal

abilities.name: Clear Skies, Clear Skies
abilities.text: Whenever one or more of your characters sings a song, gain 1 lore.

data.flavor_text:
Archazia's calming presence helped Pepa dispel
her dark mood.

data.name: So Much to Give
rules: (A character with cost 2 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Draw a card. Chosen character gains Bodyguard until the start of your next turn. (An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

data.name: Restoring the Heart
rules: Remove up to 3 damage from chosen character or location. Draw a card.
data.flavor_text:
The moment her heart was returned, greenery burst to
life and restored Te Fiti to her rightful form.

data.name: The Family Madrigal
rules: (A character with cost 5 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. You may reveal up to 1 Madrigal character card and up to 1 song card and put them into your hand. Put the rest on the top of your deck in any order.

data.name: Amber Coil

abilities.name: Healing Aura
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever a card is put into your inkwell, you may remove up to 2 damage from chosen character.

data.flavor_text:
Martin smiled as the coil snapped into place and he felt
a surge of healing energy.

data.name: Spaghetti Dinner

abilities.name: Fine Dining
abilities.text: {Exert} — If you have 2 or more characters in play, gain 1 lore.

data.flavor_text:
"Hey, Tony's! Of course. The very place for a very
special occasion."
—Tramp

data.name: Kanine Krunchies

abilities.name: You Can Be a Champion, Too
abilities.text: Your Puppy characters get +1 {Willpower}.

data.flavor_text:
"Happy dogs are those who eat nutritious Kanine
Krunchies!"

abilities.name: Perfect Pair
abilities.text: You may only have 2 copies of The Glass Slipper in your deck.

abilities.name: Search the Kingdom
abilities.text: {Exert} — Search your deck for a Princess character card and reveal it to all players. Put that card into your hand and shuffle your deck.

abilities.name: Don't You Say a Word
abilities.text: Once during your turn, whenever a card is put into your inkwell, you may return chosen character, item, or location with cost 2 or less to their player's hand, then that player draws a card.

data.name: Tanana
data.flavor_text:
"This is a place of wonder and learning. Pay attention
to the Owl and see what she can teach you."

data.name: Treasure Guardian

abilities.name: Untold Treasure
abilities.text: When you play this character, if you have an Illusion character in play, you may draw a card.

data.flavor_text:
"At last, after all my years of searching!"
—Jafar

data.name: Honeymaren

abilities.name: Tale of the Fifth Spirit
abilities.text: When you play this character, if an opponent has an exerted character in play, gain 1 lore.

data.flavor_text:
"It's said to be a bridge between us and the magic
of nature."

abilities.text: When you play this character, each opponent chooses and exerts one of their ready characters. They can't ready at the start of their next turn.

data.name: Jafar

abilities.name: This Is Not Done Yet
abilities.text: During an opponent's turn, whenever one of your Illusion characters is banished, you may return that card to your hand.

data.flavor_text:
"Now that the Hexwell Crown is finally mine, no
force in Lorcana can stand against me!"

data.name: Hades

abilities.name: For Just a Little Pain
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may deal 2 damage to another chosen character of yours to banish chosen character with cost 3 or less.

data.flavor_text: "...You get a whole lotta gain."

data.flavor_text: "Fear is what can't be trusted."

data.flavor_text:
"She only wants rules so she can break them!"
—Archimedes

data.flavor_text:
"You wanna get to Te Fiti, you have to go through
a whole ocean of bad. Not to mention Te Kā."
—Maui

abilities.name: I Win
abilities.text: When this character is banished, if you have more cards in your hand than each opponent, you may return this card to your hand.

data.flavor_text:
"Yes, I've already finished this course. I'm still
going to bounce a few more times."

data.name: Bucky

abilities.name: Pop!
abilities.text: When this character is banished in a challenge, you may draw a card.

data.flavor_text:
"Oh, hang on. I love this bit! He pops the balloon and
all those acorns go flying out. Gets me every time."
—Kronk

data.name: Pain
data.flavor_text:
"Um, wasn't there something the boss wanted us
to take care of? Was it testing these arrows?"

data.name: Donald Duck

abilities.name: Obfuscate!
abilities.text: Opponents need 25 lore to win the game.

data.flavor_text:
When it comes to magic spells, proper pronunciation
is key.

data.name: The Queen

abilities.name: No Ordinary Apple
abilities.text: {Exert} — Choose 3 cards from chosen opponent's discard and put them on the bottom of their deck to gain 3 lore. If any Princess cards were moved this way, gain 4 lore instead.

data.source: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs

data.name: Panic

abilities.name: Startled Shriek
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may move up to 2 damage counters from chosen character to chosen opposing character.

data.flavor_text:
"What the boss doesn't know won't hurt us. Much.
I hope."

data.name: Archimedes

abilities.name: More to Learn
abilities.text: Whenever an opponent chooses this character for an action or ability, you may draw a card.

data.flavor_text:
Archazia's library was a treasure trove of
knowledge even for such an educated owl.

data.name: Kashekim
data.flavor_text: "You presume much, to think you are welcome here."

data.name: Dolores Madrigal

abilities.name: I Hear You
abilities.text: Whenever one of your characters sings a song, chosen opponent reveals their hand.

data.flavor_text:
She heard Mariano's heart skip a beat. Was it
because of the puzzle, or was he looking at her?

keywords.name: Shift 5
keywords.text: (You may pay 5 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Mufasa.)

keywords.name: Evasive
keywords.text: (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

keywords.name: Resist +1
keywords.text: (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 1.)

data.name: Magical Maneuvers
rules: Return chosen character of yours to your hand. Exert chosen character.
data.flavor_text:
"Oh, I'm sure it's fine if we move these traps around.
Archazia won't mind a little magic."
—Flora

data.name: This Is My Family
rules: (A character with cost 2 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Gain 1 lore. Draw a card.
data.flavor_text: So many stars, and everybody gets to shine

data.name: Show Me More!
rules: Each player draws 3 cards.
data.source: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs
data.flavor_text:
"Weave of time, attend to me—
Reveal the moments soon to be!"

data.name: Restoring the Crown
rules: Exert all opposing characters. Whenever one of your characters banishes another character in a challenge this turn, gain 2 lore.
data.flavor_text:
The Hexwell surged with pure creative energy, fusing
the crown's pieces in a final burst of power.

data.name: Amethyst Coil

abilities.name: Magical Touch
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever a card is put into your inkwell, you may move 1 damage counter from chosen character to chosen opposing character.

data.flavor_text:
Shanzay's coil flared, sending a tendril of mystical
energy toward the damaged glimmer.

data.name: Drizella
data.flavor_text:
Once again, Drizella was confronted with a simple
truth: life wasn't fair.

data.name: Grewnge

abilities.name: Rapid Fire
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you pay 1 {Ink} less for the next action you play this turn.

data.flavor_text:
He loves two things: explosions and even more
explosions.

data.name: Baymax

abilities.name: Shhhhh
abilities.text: This character enters play exerted.

data.flavor_text:
"Processing data from Archazia's thought scrolls
is taking a great deal of power. Extreme battery
saver protocol engaged."

data.name: Thomas O'Malley

keywords.name: Ward
keywords.text: (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)

data.flavor_text: There's nothing he can't talk his way out of.

data.name: Pete

abilities.name: Pilfer and Plunder
abilities.text: Whenever you play an action that isn't a song, you may banish chosen item.

data.flavor_text: "I wasn't stealin' it! I was just keepin' it safe."

data.name: Hiro Hamada

abilities.name: Origin Story
abilities.text: When you play a Floodborn character on this card, draw a card.

data.flavor_text:
Even with a mind as brilliant as his, the mixed ink
was a unique puzzle to solve.

data.name: Cheshire Cat

abilities.name: Mad Grin
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may deal 2 damage to chosen damaged character.

data.flavor_text:
"He's not your average cat, after all. Then again,
what cat is?"
—Archazia

data.name: Shere Khan

abilities.name: What a Pity
abilities.text: When you play this character, discard your hand.

data.flavor_text:
He'd be the first to tell you he's as magnificent as
he is deadly.

data.name: Basil

abilities.name: Draw Them Out
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, opposing damaged characters gain Reckless during their next turn. (They can't quest and must challenge if able.)

data.flavor_text: "The final part of the crown! Jafar will be pleased."

data.name: Mad Hatter

abilities.name: Unbirthday Present
abilities.text: Whenever a damaged character challenges another character, you may draw a card.

data.flavor_text: "Don't you care for tea?"

keywords.name: Shift 3
keywords.text: (You may pay 3 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Queen of Hearts.)

abilities.name: If I Lose My Temper...
abilities.text: Whenever another character is played, put a damage counter on them.

keywords.text: (You may pay 5 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Hiro Hamada.)

abilities.name: You Can Be Way More
abilities.text: Your Floodborn characters that have a card under them gain Evasive and Ward. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them. Opponents can't choose them except to challenge.)

data.name: Yokai

abilities.name: Innovate
abilities.text: You pay 1 {Ink} less to play characters using their Shift ability.

data.flavor_text:
"In the hands of a lesser person, this much power
would be irresponsible."

data.name: Donald Duck

abilities.name: Duck of Action
abilities.text: Whenever this character is challenged, you may return an action card that isn't a song card from your discard to your hand.

data.flavor_text: "Aye aye, Captain! I'll get it done."

data.name: Berlioz
data.flavor_text: "Look what I found! Can we stay here and play?"

data.name: Lady

abilities.name: A Dog's Life
abilities.text: While you have a character named Tramp in play, this character gets +1 {Lore}.

data.flavor_text:
"Are you sure we're allowed in here? Jim Dear
would never allow me in the kitchen."

data.name: Yzma

abilities.name: How Shall I Do It?
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may draw a card, then choose and discard a card.

data.flavor_text:
"One of these must be the right lever, but I'll be a llama's
aunt if I can figure out which one..."

data.name: Pacha

abilities.name: Full Pack
abilities.text: While you have more cards in your hand than each opponent, this character gets +2 {Lore}.

data.flavor_text:
He liked to prepare for any emergency. They
happened frequently with Kuzco around.

data.name: Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum

abilities.name: Another Recitation
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you may return chosen damaged character to their player's hand.

data.flavor_text:
"You can't leave yet! Don't you want to hear the ending?"
—Tweedle Dee

data.flavor_text: "All right now, crew–we've a lot to do today!"

A captain must be inventive, commanding, and unafraid
of trampolines.

abilities.text: Whenever you play an action that isn't a song, you may deal 1 damage to chosen character.

abilities.text: When you play this character, chosen character of yours gets +1 {Strength} this turn for each other character you have in play.

data.name: King of Hearts

abilities.name: Objectionable State
abilities.text: Damaged characters can't challenge your characters.

data.flavor_text:
"You there! You can't be here in the state you're in.
Begone before the Queen sees this mess!"

data.name: Duchess
data.flavor_text:
"Now darlings, pay close attention to where we
are. What can you learn about the Owl from the
house?"

data.name: Anastasia

abilities.name: Oh, I Hate This!
abilities.text: Whenever this character is challenged, the challenging player chooses and discards a card.

data.flavor_text: "Out of my way! I'm going to be the first to finish!"

rules: Return chosen damaged character to their player's hand.
data.flavor_text:
"Alice! Will you kindly pay attention and recite your lesson?"
—Alice's sister

data.name: He's a Tramp
rules: (A character with cost 1 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Chosen character gets +1 {Strength} this turn for each character you have in play.
data.flavor_text: Wish that I could travel his way

data.name: The Return of Hercules
rules: Each player may reveal a character card from their hand and play it for free.
data.flavor_text:
"Congratulations, Wonderboy. You'll make one heck of a god."
—Megara

data.name: Ink Geyser
rules: Each player exerts all the cards in their inkwell. Then each player with more than 3 cards in their inkwell returns cards at random from their inkwell to their hand until they have 3 cards in their inkwell.

data.name: Emerald Coil

abilities.name: Shimmering Wings
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever a card is put into your inkwell, chosen character gains Evasive until the start of your next turn. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)

data.flavor_text: The coil Martin wore lifted his spirits as well as his body.

data.name: Grandmother Fa

abilities.name: I've Got All the Luck We'll Need
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you may give chosen character of yours +2 {Strength} this turn.

data.flavor_text: "Fear will get you hurt. Luck will get you through."

data.name: Queen of Hearts

abilities.name: Royal Pain
abilities.text: While this character has damage, she gets +3 {Strength}.

data.flavor_text:
Something told the Illumineers she'd had enough
of the obstacles.

data.name: The Matchmaker

abilities.name: You Are a Disgrace!
abilities.text: Whenever this character challenges another character, each opponent loses 1 lore.

data.flavor_text:
"Who spit in her bean curd?"
—Grandma Fa

data.name: Denahi

keywords.name: Reckless
keywords.text: (This character can't quest and must challenge each turn if able.)

keywords.name: Resist +2
keywords.text: (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 2.)

data.flavor_text: "There's no time. We have to act now!"

keywords.name: Rush
keywords.text: (This character can challenge the turn they're played.)

abilities.name: Get 'em!
abilities.text: Your other characters named Stabbington Brother gain Rush.

abilities.name: Salvage
abilities.text: For each item card in your discard, you pay 1 {Ink} less to play this character using her Shift ability.

abilities.name: Repurpose
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you may put up to 3 item cards from your discard on the bottom of your deck to gain 1 lore for each item card moved this way.

data.name: Cy-Bug

abilities.name: Hive Mind
abilities.text: This character gets +1 {Strength} for each other character you have in play.

data.flavor_text:
"Cy-Bugs are like a virus. They don't know they're
in a game."
—Calhoun

data.name: Stabbington Brother

abilities.name: Crime of Opportunity
abilities.text: When you play this character, chosen opponent loses 1 lore.

data.flavor_text: Silence is golden. And he loves gold.

data.name: Card Soldiers

abilities.name: Take Point
abilities.text: While a damaged character is in play, this character gets +2 {Strength}.

data.flavor_text:
The Three of Hearts raised his spear and
whispered to himself, "While others fall, a Queen's
soldier stands tall."

data.name: Cogsworth

abilities.name: Still Useful
abilities.text: While you have an item card in your discard, this character gets +2 {Strength}.

data.flavor_text:
"Top shelf? Pshaw! If it's a book the mademoiselle
wants, I'll find a way to get it for her!"

data.name: Toby
data.flavor_text:
"Toby has the most splendid sense of smell of any
hound I've trained. But he can be deucedly frisky."
—Basil

abilities.name: Hurry It Up!
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, chosen character of yours gains Rush and Resist +1 this turn. (They can challenge the turn they're played. Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

abilities.name: I Won't Let You Down
abilities.text: This character can challenge ready characters.

abilities.name: Enormous Responsibility
abilities.text: While this character has damage, he gets +2 {Strength}.

keywords.name: Evasive
keywords.text: (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

abilities.name: Adventurous Spirit
abilities.text: Whenever this character challenges another character, another chosen character of yours gets +3 {Strength} this turn.

data.name: The Phantom Blot

keywords.name: Rush
keywords.text: (This character can challenge the turn they're played.)

data.flavor_text:
Nobody knows who or what he really is or what
he's planning.

data.name: Beast

abilities.name: I've Had It!
abilities.text: {Exert} — Deal 5 damage to chosen character.

data.flavor_text:
"No, no, no! This is NOT THE WAY I SEE IT IN
MY HEAD!"

abilities.name: Intimidating and Awe-inspiring
abilities.text: Whenever one of your characters challenges, they gain Resist +2 during that challenge. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 2.)

abilities.name: Guardian of Lost Souls
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever one of your characters banishes another character in a challenge, gain 2 lore.

abilities.name: How on Earth Did That Happen?
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may banish chosen item of yours to draw a card. If the banished item is named Maurice's Machine, you may also banish chosen character with 2 {Strength} or less.

keywords.name: Evasive
keywords.text: (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

abilities.name: Star Power
abilities.text: Whenever this character challenges another character, your other characters get +1 {Lore} this turn.

data.name: Lyle Tiberius Rourke

abilities.name: Explosive
abilities.text: Once during your turn, whenever a card is put into your inkwell, deal 2 damage to each character in play.

data.flavor_text:
He got what he wanted—just not the way he
planned.

keywords.name: Shift 5
keywords.text: (You may pay 5 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Mulan.)

keywords.name: Evasive
keywords.text: (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

abilities.name: Exceptional Leader
abilities.text: Whenever this character challenges another character, your other characters gain "This character can challenge ready characters" this turn.

data.name: Baloo

abilities.name: Fight Like a Bear
abilities.text: Your characters with 7 {Strength} or more can't be dealt damage.

data.flavor_text:
"Now, move. That's it. Now give me a big bear
growl. Scare me."

data.name: Ratigan

abilities.name: A Marvelous Performance
abilities.text: Whenever you play an action while this character is exerted, gain 1 lore.

data.flavor_text: "Why stop the show when you can simply steal it?"

data.name: Sir Kay
data.flavor_text:
"An owl in charge? Pshaw." He glared at the
others. Then his eye fell on the targets set up
nearby, and he brightened. "But as long as I still
get to joust..."

data.name: Milo Thatch

abilities.name: I'm Your Guy
abilities.text: Whenever you play an action, you may give chosen character +2 {Strength} this turn.

data.flavor_text:
"Okay, we rotated the globe to move the mural
into position. We have the coordinates. Let's go!"

data.name: Edgar Balthazar
data.flavor_text:
"All these traps, all these locks, all these machines...
If they think that's going to stop me, they've sorely
underestimated Edgar Balthazar!"

data.name: We've Got Company!
rules: Ready all your characters. They gain Reckless this turn. (They can't quest and must challenge if able.)
data.flavor_text:
"Well, as usual, diplomacy has failed us."
—Lyle Tiberius Rourke

data.name: Out of Order
rules: Banish chosen character.
data.flavor_text: The last thing any gamer wants to see.

data.name: Ruby Coil

abilities.name: Crimson Spark
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever a card is put into your inkwell, chosen character gets +2 {Strength} this turn.

data.flavor_text:
Venturo felt a spark from his arm coil, and energy flooded
his strained muscles.

data.name: Unconventional Tool

abilities.name: Fixed in No Time
abilities.text: When this item is banished, you pay 2 {Ink} less for the next item you play this turn.

data.flavor_text:
"I use this one a lot more than you'd think!"
—Maurice

data.name: Maurice's Machine

abilities.name: Break Down
abilities.text: When this item is banished, you may return an item card with cost 2 or less from your discard to your hand.

data.flavor_text:
"I hope it does what I built it to do!"
—Maurice

data.name: Devil's Eye Diamond

abilities.name: The Price of Power
abilities.text: {Exert} — If one of your characters was damaged this turn, gain 1 lore.

data.flavor_text:
"Just look at it, filled with power for its owner."
—Madame Medusa

keywords.name: Support
keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

abilities.name: Breaking Story
abilities.text: Your other characters with Support get +1 {Strength}.

abilities.name: Put It to Good Use
abilities.text: You may exert 4 items of yours to play this character for free.

abilities.name: Fortune Hunter
abilities.text: When you play this character, look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal an item card and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

data.name: Mattias

abilities.name: Proud to Serve
abilities.text: Your Queen characters gain Ward. (Opponents can't choose them except to challenge.)

data.flavor_text: "You must move quickly before the trap resets. Go!"

data.name: Moana
data.flavor_text:
Moana receives a call from the ancestors to sail
to new skies and reconnect people across the
entire ocean.

data.name: Monsieur D'Arque

abilities.name: I've Come to Collect
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you may banish chosen item of yours to draw a card.

data.flavor_text:
"I can help you with your problem...for the right
price."

data.name: Gaetan Moliere
data.flavor_text:
"Fascinating. This shouldn't exist, yet it does. It
may be older than the Great Illuminary itself."

data.name: Belle

abilities.name: What a Mess
abilities.text: During your turn, you may banish chosen item of yours to play this character for free.

data.flavor_text:
Helping her dad keep the flying debris to a
minimum.

abilities.name: Follow My Voice
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, look at the top 2 cards of your deck. You may reveal any number of Puppy character cards and put them in your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

data.name: Dawson

abilities.name: Be Sensible
abilities.text: Once during your turn, whenever a card is put into your inkwell, look at the top card of your deck. You may put it on either the top or the bottom of your deck.

data.flavor_text: "I say, what sort of contraption is this?"

abilities.name: Coolest Collection
abilities.text: When you play this character, return up to 2 item cards from your discard to your hand.

abilities.name: I'm Beautiful, Baby!
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you may play an item for free.

keywords.name: Shift 3
keywords.text: (You may pay 3 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Heihei.)

keywords.name: Resist +1
keywords.text: (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 1.)

abilities.name: Clear Your Mind
abilities.text: When you play this character, put all cards from your hand into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

keywords.name: Ward
keywords.text: (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)

abilities.name: Key to the Puzzle
abilities.text: {Exert} — Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. Put one into your inkwell facedown and exerted and the other on the top of your deck.

data.name: Toulouse
data.flavor_text:
He squeezed more paint from the tube and
wiggled in delight. Archazia was fun, even if she
was a giant owl. She had so many new colors to
paint with!

data.name: Marie

abilities.name: I'll Show You
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you may give chosen character -2 {Strength} this turn.

data.flavor_text:
"Find yourself another Illumineer. This one's
taken."

data.name: Pepper

abilities.name: In the Nick of Time
abilities.text: Whenever one of your Puppy characters is banished, you may put that card into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

data.flavor_text: Pepper proves every puppy is part of the pack.

data.name: Freckles

abilities.name: Just So Cute!
abilities.text: When you play this character, chosen opposing character gets -1 {Strength} this turn.

data.flavor_text: "I want to play with the others! Can I, Dad? Please?"

abilities.name: Pretty Great, Huh?
abilities.text: Whenever you play a Floodborn character, if you used Shift to play them, you may remove up to 2 damage from chosen character.

data.name: Robin Hood

keywords.name: Support
keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

data.flavor_text:
"There's been a heap of legends and tall tales
about Robin Hood. All different too."
—Alan-a-Dale

data.name: Penny the Orphan

abilities.name: Our Bottle Worked!
abilities.text: While you have a Hero character in play, this character gains Ward. (Opponents can't choose them except to challenge.)

data.flavor_text:
"Penny, dear, now don't cry. We are here to help you."
—Miss Bianca

keywords.name: Bodyguard
keywords.text: (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

keywords.name: Ward
keywords.text: (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)

data.name: Jasmine

abilities.name: Extra Assistance
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, if you have no cards in your hand, draw a card for each Ally character you have in play.

data.flavor_text:
"Oh, this is wonderful! I knew Archazia's thought
scrolls would be worth a little extra effort!"

keywords.name: Support
keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

abilities.name: I Got Your Four Basic Food Groups
abilities.text: When you play this character, chosen character gains Resist +1 until the start of your next turn. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

abilities.name: Advanced Scanner
abilities.text: When you play this character, look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Floodborn character card and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

abilities.name: Good Shot
abilities.text: During an opponent's turn, whenever one of your Ally characters is damaged, deal 1 damage to chosen opposing character.

abilities.name: Fair Play
abilities.text: Your characters named Lady Kluck gain Resist +1. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

data.name: Water Has Memory
rules: Look at the top 4 cards of chosen player's deck. Put one on the top of their deck and the rest on the bottom of their deck in any order.

data.name: All Is Found
rules: (A character with cost 5 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Put up to 2 cards from your discard into your inkwell facedown and exerted.
data.flavor_text:
Where the north wind meets the sea
There's a river full of memory

data.name: Sapphire Coil

abilities.name: Brilliant Shine
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever a card is put into your inkwell, you may give chosen character -2 {Strength} this turn.

data.flavor_text:
A single flash of light from the coil on Venturo's leg could
blind any foe.

data.name: Baymax's Charging Station

abilities.name: Energy Converter
abilities.text: Whenever you play a Floodborn character, if you used Shift to play them, you may draw a card.

data.flavor_text:
"Battery at 100%. Ready for action!"
—Hiro

data.name: Dr. Calico

abilities.name: You're Beginning to Irk Me
abilities.text: While this character has no damage, he gains Resist +2. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 2.)

data.flavor_text: "Everything is positioning nicely."

data.name: Akela
data.flavor_text:
A wise leader does not shy away from difficult
decisions when the safety of the pack is at stake.

keywords.name: Challenger +3
keywords.text: (While challenging, this character gets +3 {Strength}.)

abilities.name: Quick Reflexes
abilities.text: During your turn, this character gains Evasive. (They can challenge characters with Evasive.)

data.name: Bolt

abilities.name: There's No Turning Back
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, if he has no damage, you may draw a card, then choose and discard a card.

data.flavor_text: "Looks like we're gonna do this the hard way."

data.name: HeiHei
data.flavor_text:
Archazia: "Why is he wearing a coconut?"
Shanzay: "It's probably better not to ask."

abilities.name: A Greater Purpose
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever a card is put into your inkwell, this character gains Resist +1 until the start of your next turn. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

keywords.name: Bodyguard
keywords.text: (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

keywords.name: Resist +2
keywords.text: (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 2.)

data.name: Fa Zhou

abilities.name: Training Exercises
abilities.text: Whenever one of your characters challenges another character, if it's the second challenge this turn, gain 3 lore.

data.flavor_text:
"Every trap you disarm, every test you pass,
honors us all. Well done."

data.name: Razoul

abilities.name: My Orders Come from Jafar
abilities.text: When you play this character, if you have a character named Jafar in play, you may banish chosen item.

data.flavor_text: "Mere trinkets won't get you any closer to Jafar."

data.name: Jafar

abilities.name: That's Better
abilities.text: When you play this character, chosen character gains Challenger +2 this turn. (They get +2 {Strength} while challenging.)

data.flavor_text: "At last, both halves of the crown belong to me!"

data.name: Tick-Tock

abilities.name: Looking For Lunch
abilities.text: During your turn, this character gains Evasive while a Pirate character is in play. (They can challenge characters with Evasive.)

data.flavor_text:
"I say, Captain, do you hear something?"
—Peter Pan

data.name: Kakamora

abilities.name: Showboating
abilities.text: While you have another Pirate character in play, this character gains Challenger +3. (While challenging, this character gets +3 {Strength}.)

data.flavor_text:
"They're...kinda cute."
—Moana

data.name: Mulan

abilities.name: Where Do I Sign In?
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may draw a card, then choose and discard a card.

data.flavor_text:
"Okay this is it, time to show 'em your man walk."
—Mushu

data.name: Orville

abilities.name: Welcome Aboard, Folks
abilities.text: During your turn, while you have a character named Miss Bianca or Bernard in play, this character gains Evasive. (They can challenge characters with Evasive.)

data.flavor_text:
"Doesn't he fly beautifully?"
—Miss Bianca

data.name: Miss Bianca

abilities.name: Have a Little Faith
abilities.text: If you have an Ally character in play, you pay 2 {Ink} less to play this character.

data.flavor_text:
"We'll reach the top of this tower in no time if we
work together, darling."

data.name: Mufasa
data.flavor_text:
"Do you see this pillar? Even after it has fallen,
it still can serve a purpose."

abilities.name: Helping Hand
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you may play an Ally character with cost 3 or less for free.

abilities.name: Put in the Effort
abilities.text: While this character is exerted, your Ally characters get +1 {Strength}.

keywords.name: Bodyguard
keywords.text: (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

abilities.name: You've Got to Be Brave
abilities.text: During an opponent's turn, when this character is banished, deal 2 damage to each opposing character.

abilities.name: Close All Channels
abilities.text: When you play this character, characters can't exert to sing songs until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: Don't Get Any Ideas
abilities.text: Each player pays 2 {Ink} more to play actions or items. (This doesn't apply to singing songs.)

data.name: Mickey Mouse

abilities.name: Stirring Spirit
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever this character banishes another character in a challenge, you may play a character for free.

data.flavor_text: He leads the way with a steadfast heart.

data.name: Restoring Atlantis
rules: Your characters can't be challenged until the start of your next turn.
data.flavor_text:
"In times of danger, the crystal will choose a host, one
of royal blood, to protect itself and its people."
—King Kashekim Nedakh

data.name: Double Trouble
rules: Deal 1 damage each to up to 2 chosen characters.
data.flavor_text:
"We've had enough of your shenanigans! Take that!"
—Merryweather

data.name: Steel Coil

abilities.name: Metallic Flow
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever a card is put into your inkwell, you may draw a card, then choose and discard a card.

data.flavor_text:
As the coil clicked onto Shanzay's arm, she felt a
strengthened sense of clarity.

data.name: Training Staff

abilities.name: Precision Strike
abilities.text: {Exert} — Chosen character gains Challenger +2 this turn. (They get +2 {Strength} while challenging.)

data.flavor_text:
"Do not sit idle while others quest for glory."
—Li Shang
